title: UMPQUA FLASH ASSISTANCE PROGRAM - 211info
text: GLIDE REVITALIZATION UMPQUA FLASH ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps reduce wildfire risk by visiting homes to assess fire hazards and educate residents. Provides tree trimming and vegetation clearing to create defensible space around homes. Also hosts community clean-up days to remove vegetation from private and public properties, and educational workshops on fire prevention and preparedness. 301 Glide Loop Drive Glide, OR 97443 Eligibility: Homeowners. (Renters may apply if the property owner approves the work and owner's signature is on program application.) Hours: April-May and October-December, subject to weather conditions Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete the online application. Applicants will be added to a waitlist. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Fire Prevention Information Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services * Disaster/Emergency Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - CARMEN BERNAL COMPASSIONATE NURSING SCHOLARSHIP COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - GLIDE REVITALIZATION SKILLED TRADES SCHOLARSHIP DISASTER SERVICES - DONATIONS PROGRAM DISASTER SERVICES - MARCH 2025 FLOOD RECOVERY SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
